name: Spitter
description: The Spitter abandons the usual Vladof spin-up in favor of a fire rate that surges and dips while you hold the trigger, giving it a more erratic feel than most Vladof rifles. It can also double-tap unexpectedly, spitting two rounds in quick succession. Accuracy is poor, but the recoil stays relatively tame, so it works best when you lean into close-range chaos rather than clean precision.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher.
